name: dockerfile-audit
title: Dockerfile Security & Quality Audit
description: Hadolint-grade Dockerfile audit, MCP-native. 18+ checks across 5 categories (base image, instructions, security, efficiency, secrets) with severity, line numbers, remediation, and fix snippets. Pay-per-event. Call from Claude Desktop, Cursor, n8n, or any MCP client. Built by Unbearable TechTips.
